title: Add Generative Soundscape to video_audio
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Generative Soundscape](https://generative-soundscape.vercel.app/) to video_audio
- Convert your words into endless music with Generative Soundscape.

Fixes #11962

gist.headline: Endless music from words
gist.blurb: The hive is buzzing with a new tune! Generative Soundscape just landed in the greenhouse, turning your text prompts into endless musical loops.
gist.summary: Added 'Generative Soundscape' to the community apps greenhouse, a new tool that converts text prompts into continuous music.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use Generative Soundscape from the apps directory to generate endless audio tracks from their words.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a 'Generative Soundscape' app that turns words into endless music. Visuals should include Polly the bee wearing headphones, interacting with a retro boombox or a gramophone that is sprouting musical notes and code. A cozy, lo-fi music-making scene.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny headphones, floating next to a chunky retro boombox that is emitting glowing musical notes and text. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
